goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The failure is harness-only: the exact text matches both the visible recipe card and collection-dialog copy, while the filtered route and coverage assertion establish product behavior. The existing Recipe results region and exact card-link accessible name provide a unique semantic locator. T064 stayed inside its approved slice and passed focused gates; browser, full-suite, isolated build, disposable-DB, and final integrity evidence remain.

worker_package.objective: In tests/e2e/pantry-recipe-planner.spec.ts only, replace the broad exact-text assertion with the exact Open Planner lentil stew link scoped to Recipe results, preserve every fixture/action/assertion/timeout/viewport, then complete all remaining isolated Pantry recipe/planner verification.
verify: Require pre-hash 786BD06780732378DA255732FF4D4A86DF9468F9BEDD347C8142273D8BA5EC70 and change only the locator.
Run scoped Prettier/ESLint, prepare isolated mirror, and prove source/mirror hash equality.
Run fresh isolated Playwright with 390/768/1280, keyboard, axe, persistence reload, screenshots, containment, and zero browser errors.
Run full tests, lint, typecheck, and OpenAPI validation.
Run isolated production build without shared .next.
Release port 3100 and prove final diff/status/hash integrity.
stop_if: The pre-hash differs or more than the single locator edit is required.
The scoped exact link is not unique and visible.
Any product behavior fails or any product/schema/docs file must change.
Any assertion, fixture, action, timeout, or viewport must weaken.
Verification would disturb shared/live state, secrets, provider credentials, concurrent work, or a normal database.

evidence: The broad exact-text locator collides with the card title and dialog copy.
Recipe results contains a unique link named Open Planner lentil stew.
T064 focused type, unit, integration, lint, OpenAPI, format, mirror, and port checks passed.
The pre-edit spec hash was independently confirmed.

parallel_safety.rationale: One atomic spec edit and isolated browser/build/database lifecycle must be serial.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
